channel.title: Projects on matkv.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on matkv.dev

item.title: matkv.dev
item.description:
A personal site generated from an Obsidian vault using a custom CLI tool. Content is written in Obsidian and synced to Hugo via VaultContentGen.

The source for the generator is on GitHub.

item.title: VaultContentGen
item.description: A C# CLI tool that scans an Obsidian vault, parses YAML frontmatter, and writes Hugo-compatible markdown with TOML frontmatter. Handles section mapping, content types, and index pages.
